key.name: show-hidden
key.description: Whether to show hidden files in the file lists.

key.name: show-meta
key.description: Whether to show file metadata like modified date in the columns.

key.name: zoom-level
key.description: The current zoom level of the application.

key.name: view-type
key.description: The current view mode (miller, icons, list).

key.name: show-sidebar
key.description: Whether the navigation sidebar is visible.

key.name: sort-type
key.description: The method used to sort files (name, date, size).
